executives.name: Jonathan Price
executives.background: Jonathan Price was appointed President and Chief Executive Officer in September 2022. He previously served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer from October 2020 to September 2022. Before joining Teck, he was with BHP for 14 years in various senior roles including Chief Transformation Officer.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Crystal Prystai
executives.background: Crystal Prystai was appointed Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer in September 2022. She joined Teck in 2008 and has held progressively senior roles in finance, including Vice President and Corporate Controller.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Ian Anderson
executives.background: Ian Anderson is the Senior Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer. He is responsible for Teck’s marketing and logistics activities globally.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer

executives.name: Shehzad Bharmal
executives.background: Shehzad Bharmal is the Senior Vice President, Base Metals. He has been with Teck since 1992 and has held various operational and commercial leadership roles.

board_of_directors.name: Sheila Murray
board_of_directors.background: Sheila Murray is the Chair of the Board of Teck. She was previously President of CI Financial Corp. and is a corporate lawyer by training.

board_of_directors.name: Norman Keevil III
board_of_directors.background: Norman Keevil III is a professional engineer and has been a director of Teck since 1997. He is the Vice Chair of the Board.

board_of_directors.name: Jonathan Price
board_of_directors.background: President and CEO of Teck Resources Limited.

board_of_directors.name: Sarah Strunk
board_of_directors.background: Sarah Strunk is Chair of the Board of Directors of Fennemore Craig, P.C., a law firm. She has extensive experience in the mining industry.

sources.source_description: Teck Resources Limited Management Proxy Circular (Form 6-K)
Teck Resources Official Website - Leadership Team
